description: Fixture candidates for the read-only Tuesday/Supabase source-of-truth readback harness. Gmail evidence is fixture/local benchmark only. Xero evidence is looked up from local cache.

cases.title: Tineke accounts email has useful snippet but empty/unretrieved full body

gmail.subject: Accounts 27-05-2026
gmail.snippet: Accounts and bank rec are updated; missing paperwork includes Perplexity, Trade Me, OpenAI, Apple, ElevenLabs, Hubdoc/admin items.

monday_optional.note: not relevant; admin/Hubdoc evidence must not become a warm reply or filing action

gmail.body: Fixture only; live Gmail not read by this harness.

monday_optional.note: not checked; Monday is not source of truth for deciding quote follow-up

cases.title: Camilla older inbound is superseded by later substantive sent reply

cases.title: Lead email reply candidate with full Gmail body and Tuesday row

gmail.subject: Dining table enquiry

monday_optional.note: not required for lead reply fixture

cases.title: Accepted customer approval requiring human bridge email and Xero invoice decision but blocked without source readback

gmail.snippet: Approved, please go ahead and invoice us.

cases.title: Benchtop/customer quote reply needing quote-control margin gate and delivery destination

gmail.subject: Benchtop quote
gmail.snippet: Can you quote delivered to Wanaka?
gmail.body: Hi, can you please quote a rimu benchtop around 2400 x 900 and include delivery to Wanaka if possible?

cases.title: Xero quote draft local brief with quote spine margin and delivery proof

gmail.subject: Please prepare quote
gmail.body: Hi Guido, yes please prepare the formal quote for the 2400 x 1000 dining table in red beech with steel Crossroads base for Christchurch delivery.

monday_optional.note: not required for complete local brief fixture

xero_readback_fixture.note: fixture proves readback shape only; no Xero API call
